author: anon-59ff128d
content: Plan: (1) Move locking OUT of write_atomic/AtomicBatch — these become pure write primitives again. (2) Create crates/ripsed/ facade with re-exports + high-level apply_to_file() that does locked read-modify-write as a single atomic unit. (3) Update CLI file_mode and json_mode to acquire FileLock before reading, hold through write. This eliminates the race where two processes read the same original, compute independently, and clobber each other.
